headline: Apple's Augmented Reality Gamble Faces Challenges As Rivals Surge Ahead In AI and Design
summary: Meta and Alphabet are leading the charge in the consumer augmented reality (AR) space, with Apple looming as a formidable contender.

headline: Elizabeth Warren To Elon Musk: Cut Unnecessary Federal Cannabis Enforcement And Save Billions
summary: Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) sent a detailed letter to Elon Musk, chair of the newly established Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) with numerous suggestions for slashing federal spending.

headline: Cuban on Musk: 'I Have No Problem Throwing Elon Under the Bus, but I'll Save It for When It's Truly Deserved'
summary: Last year in the wake of a Secret Service probe into Elon Musk‘s online remarks, entrepreneur Mark Cuban came forward to defend Musk's online antics, despite acknowledging them as "kind of insane."

headline: Morgan Stanley Reveals Top 20 AI-Driven Stocks as Adoption Hits Critical Mass
summary: Katy Huberty, the Global Head of Research at Morgan Stanley, has spotlighted 20 stocks from companies that are likely to see significant benefits from the adoption of Artificial Intelligence (AI).

headline: Elon Musk Faces Criticism From Biographer Over Auschwitz Visit: 'He Truly Is a Sociopath'
summary: Elon Musk has been branded a "sociopath" by his biographer Seth Abramson following the re-emergence of images from Musk's January 2024 visit to Auschwitz.

headline: Remote Work Vs. Return-To-Office: Can Veeva's Flexibility Outshine JPMorgan's Office Mandate?
summary: Veeva's strong remote work policies are attracting top talent and boosting stock performance, contrasting with JPMorgan's return-to-office mandate amid employee backlash.

headline: Bill Gates: 'I Would Probably Be Diagnosed on the Autism Spectrum' if Growing Up Today
summary: In his upcoming memoir, Bill Gates suggests that he may be neurodivergent, stating that if he were a child today, he would likely be diagnosed on the autism spectrum.

headline: Trump's EV Policy Shakes Market, Tesla's Upcoming FSD Upgrade, And Inside Trump's $1.5M Beast: This Week In Mobility

summary: 13 large-cap stocks fell last week, including FTAI, EA, and ERIC. Reasons include delayed filings, financial results, and analyst downgrades.

headline: Elon Musk's Shocking Remarks To Far-Right German Party: 'Too Much Focus on Past Guilt'
summary: Elon Musk told a far-right rally in Germany that the nation's citizens should take pride in their heritage and let go of the guilt associated with Germany's fascist past.

headline: Netflix, Palantir And Moderna Are Among Top 12 Large Cap Gainers Last Week (Jan 20-Jan 24): Are The Others In Your Portfolio?
summary: 12 large-cap stocks saw significant gains last week, including Summit Therapeutics, Rocket Lab, Moderna, and Netflix. Analysts raised price forecasts.
